title: propeller: testing for differences in cell type proportions in single cell data.

content:
S-EPMC9563678 PMC9563678 propeller: testing for differences in cell type proportions in single cell data.

Motivation

Single cell RNA-Sequencing (scRNA-seq) has rapidly gained popularity over the last few years for profiling the transcriptomes of thousands to millions of single cells. This
